creator: phk@critter.freebsd.dk
text:
In message <56677.968079710@axl.fw.uunet.co.za>, Sheldon Hearn writes:
>
>Hi gents,
>
>Could you two take a look at PR kern/20992?  The reported error message
>was introduced by Peter, but it looks like it may have been tickled by
>Poul-Henning's change to the dgb(4) driver.

Hmm, I think I have to pass on this one.  I just checked the changes
I've made and I don't see any which I can implicate in this.

Are you sure there are enough kernel resources for your needs ?
Consider yanking maxusers up a bit...

--
Poul-Henning Kamp       | UNIX since Zilog Zeus 3.20
phk@FreeBSD.ORG         | TCP/IP since RFC 956
FreeBSD coreteam member | BSD since 4.3-tahoe    
Never attribute to malice what can adequately be explained by incompetence.
